description: CompositionBrown T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves and branding on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not use a fabric softenerTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsFeel natural and be at your sensational best in this cool T-shirt from Solognac. Excellent for everyday use and light on the skin, you will love to work or play in great style in this tee. The perfect wear designed to grab attention. Pair it with shorts or jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
